description: The StringQRCodeTexture Component is used to encode string data like URLs and text into a QR code texture.

fields.Payload: The string to encode into the QR code.
fields.ECCLevel: The level of error correction to encode (for use with a dirty QR code for higher values)
fields.Color0: The background color of the QR code
fields.Color1: The color of the usually black squares of the QRCode

usage: Attach to a slot and insert into a material to view the result. Don't forget to provide a ``Payload``.
